subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! God willing, through the bounty of the Absolute Creator, mayest thou abide beneath the shade of the divine Lote-Tree, and from the pure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز حق انشاء الله بعنایت خالق مطلق در ظل سدره ربانیه ساکن باشی و از زلال
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
